reason: Successfully navigated to the agent, verified status, sent a math question, and received correct response.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Application loaded successfully with sidebar showing three agents.
Clicked on agent "QA-20260429-020830-5pjm" in the sidebar - Agent detail page loaded, showing the chat interface.
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - Status confirmed as "idle" (displayed in the top status indicator).
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input field - Message was successfully entered in the textbox.
Clicked Send button - Message was sent, agent status changed to "working", and a new session "Math Basics Question Session" was created.
Waited for response and verified it mentions "4" - Agent responded with "4" within 1 second. Response is displayed clearly in the chat view showing the correct answer to 2+2.
